papers.title_en: GenED-SC: Generative Editing Semantic Communication with Integrated Multi-Modal LLMs
papers.authors: Shuoyao Wang, Weisheng Xie, Mingze Gong, Suzhi Bi, Li Ping Qian
papers.evidence: 利用多模态大语言模型进行生成式编辑的语义通信
papers.tldr: 现有语义通信方法在视觉质量与可靠性间难以平衡。本文提出GenED-SC，一个两阶段图像语义传输框架，集成多模态大语言模型进行生成编辑。第一阶段，基于联合信源信道编码的区分性传输优先保留场景布局和对象完整性；第二阶段，MLLM根据文本描述细化缺失细节，增强语义保真度。大量实验证明，在多种信道条件下，尤其在低信噪比区域，该方法在语义保持、感知质量和视觉保真度上均达到最优。
papers.abstract_en: Deep learning-based joint source-channel coding has recently demonstrated strong potential for semantic communication (SemComm). However, most existing approaches focus on optimizing visual-fidelity metrics, which can lead to reduced perceptual quality. Generative model-based SemComm leverages rich prior knowledge from large-scale pre-training to enhance perceptual quality, but often at the cost of increased distortion and unreliability. This paper addresses the above issues by proposing a two-stage semantic image transmission framework, integrating a multimodal large language model (MLLM) for generative editing. In the first stage, a JSCC-based discriminative transmission selectively prioritizes semantically important regions, preserving scene layout and object integrity under limited bandwidth. In the second phase, MLLM-driven generative editing refines missing details based on the textual descriptions, enhancing semantic fidelity and perceptual quality. Extensive experiments show that the proposed framework achieves state-of-the-art performance in semantic preservation, perceptual quality, and visual fidelity across a wide range of channel conditions, especially in low-SNR regimes.

papers.title_en: Deep neural network yields regularization for ill-posed inverse problems
papers.authors: Qiao Zhu, Lan Wang, Ye Zhang
papers.evidence: DNN正则化逆问题方法，可应用于通信信道估计
papers.tldr: 不适定逆问题广泛存在于科学工程中，深度神经网络的架构复杂度可作为天然正则化项。本文提出一种确定性框架，通过自适应扩大网络类将架构正则化从浅层网络扩展到深层，其中网络类的扩大由差异原则驱动。针对参数半径已知和未知两种场景，分别设计了两种扩展DNN算法，算法自动扩大网络直至满足差异准则，无需手动调节。证明了算法的有限终止性，并证明正则化解随噪声消失收敛到真实解，同时推导了终止网络架构的显式渐近上界，揭示了所需网络复杂度与噪声水平的关系。数值实验在线性和非线性逆问题上验证了理论，展示了该框架的有效性和自适应性。
papers.abstract_en: This paper studies the regularization of ill-posed inverse problems by deep neural networks (DNNs). We extend architecture-based regularization from shallow networks to deep models by developing a deterministic framework in which the admissible network class is enlarged adaptively and the resulting architecture complexity acts as the regularization mechanism. We propose two discrepancy-principle-driven expanding DNN algorithms to treat the cases where an explicit parameter-radius bound is available and unavailable, respectively. For both algorithms, we prove the finite termination of the adaptive expansion procedure and the convergence of the regularized solutions as the noise level vanishes. In addition, we derive explicit asymptotic bounds on the terminal network architecture, thereby quantifying how the required network complexity scales with the noise level. Numerical experiments on several representative linear and non-linear inverse problems support the theoretical findings and illustrate the practical usefulness of the proposed framework.

papers.title_en: Toward Reliable Semantic Communication: Beyond Average Performance
papers.authors: Boyuan Li, Mingze Gong, Shuoyao Wang, Suzhi Bi, Jia Yan, Ying-Jun Angela Zhang
papers.evidence: 深度学习用于可靠语义通信
papers.tldr: 语义通信在动态不确定环境下可靠性成为瓶颈，现有设计主要优化平均性能而对恶劣条件下的低尾性能保护不足。本文首先回顾了三种可靠性设计类别：信道自适应、鲁棒编解码和HARQ，指出它们从互补角度提升可靠性但各有局限。然后讨论了两种前沿方向：非完美信道状态信息下的鲁棒自适应语义通信，以及联合源信道校验编码与自适应重传实现样本级可靠性增强。最后展望了鲁棒性与重传联合设计、开发超越平均的可靠性指标以及兼容现有数字无线网络等未来研究方向。该工作为构建可靠语义通信系统提供了统一视角和解决路径。
papers.abstract_en: Semantic communication has emerged as a promising paradigm for improving transmission efficiency by conveying task-relevant semantics rather than raw data. Although recent studies have achieved notable gains in communication efficiency and average task performance, reliability remains a fundamental bottleneck in dynamic and uncertain environments. In particular, most existing designs are still optimized mainly for average-case behavior, while lower-tail performance under adverse transmission conditions remains insufficiently understood and inadequately protected. In this article, we present a unified perspective on reliable semantic communication beyond average performance. We first review three reliability-oriented design categories: channel-aware adaptation, robustness-oriented codec design, and hybrid automatic repeat request (HARQ)-based retransmission. We show that these approaches address reliability from complementary perspectives, but each still has inherent limitations. Motivated by these observations, we discuss two solution directions: robust adaptive semantic communication under imperfect CSI, and joint source-channel-check coding with adaptive retransmission for sample-level reliability enhancement. Finally, we outline several future research directions, including the joint design of robustness and retransmission, reliability metrics beyond averages, and compatibility with existing digital wireless networks.
